name: Baby Jey
description: '''Baby Jey''' is a Canadian indie rock band based in [[Edmonton]], [[Alberta]], founded in 2015 by core members Jeremy Witten (guitar, keyboards, lead vocals) and Dean Kheroufi (bass, backing vocals). In 2017, Baby Jey started performing as a four-piece  band with the addition of Trevor McNeely (lap steel guitar) and Connor Ellinger (drums). The band was previously based in [[Brooklyn, New York]], around the release of their 2018 album ''[[Someday Cowboy]]'', before returning to Edmonton where they recorded their 2023 album ''Crop Circles''.
